execution_run.what happened: Added a command-owned planning intake-artifact helper for common freehand artifacts, routed markdown artifacts to execplan scaffolds, routed schema-ready decomposition records to canonical decomposition paths, updated freehand/misplaced warning remediation to point at the helper, and refreshed command contracts/generated adapters.
execution_run.scope touched: Planning runtime helper, generated command contracts/adapters, checker remediation, operational affordance roles, payload classification, and focused tests.
execution_run.changed surfaces: packages/planning/src/repo_planning_bootstrap/installer.py; packages/planning/src/repo_planning_bootstrap/runtime_projection.py; packages/planning/scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py; src/agentic_workspace/contracts/* command/adapter/operation registries; generated planning/workspace command package outputs; packages/planning/tests; tests/test_contract_tooling.py
